title: Research To Paper Trace
purpose: Turn a local research question into an audit-ready paper/work-note trail.

steps.label: Open a real research project board
steps.action_hint: Use Research Projects, then Project Detail or Research Log.

steps.label: Capture paper evidence
steps.action_hint: Use Papers and Read Note, or queue bounded PDF Extract.

steps.label: Record dataset/result provenance
steps.action_hint: Use Data Center and Data Note for local provenance prompts.

steps.label: Draft a shared-memory update
steps.action_hint: Use Memory Shelves, Detail, and Proposal before any promotion.

title: Code To Release Handoff
purpose: Move from local repository understanding to safe verification and release notes.
expected_artifacts: Code Workshop context pack or patch plan

steps.label: Select a local repository
steps.action_hint: Use Code Projects, Explain Code, Context Pack, or Patch Plan.

steps.label: Inspect or run allowlisted checks
steps.action_hint: Use Terminal Jobs for command posture, or Code Workshop Run Check for project checks.

steps.label: Prepare GitHub handoff
steps.action_hint: Use Harbor Repos, GH Status, and Harbor Draft without publishing.

steps.label: Write release readiness evidence
steps.action_hint: Use Release, Rel Checklist, and Rel Report.

title: Memory Knowledge Maintenance
purpose: Keep project knowledge discoverable without mutating source folders.
expected_artifacts: File Vault tag or organize proposal

steps.label: Search cached knowledge
steps.action_hint: Use Knowledge Index, Search Wiki, and Open Knowledge.

steps.label: Find and tag a useful local artifact
steps.action_hint: Use File Roots/Search Files, Preview File, Tag File, or Organize Plan.

steps.label: Draft reviewed memory
steps.action_hint: Use Proposal first; Promote remains confirmation-gated.

steps.label: Check registry health
steps.action_hint: Use Registry Health to validate JSON shape without edits.

title: Agent Ops Loop
purpose: Coordinate safe local agent tasks, tools, logs, and rollback-aware monitoring.

steps.label: Review agents and queue safe work
steps.action_hint: Use Agent Roster, Agent Tasks, Tool Catalog, or Agent Chat.

steps.label: Route a real task into agent context
steps.action_hint: Use Task Board, Open Task, and Task Agent.

steps.label: Watch jobs, events, and logs
steps.action_hint: Use Job Queue, Job Events, Open Job Log, and Event Log.

steps.label: Inspect safety receipts
steps.action_hint: Use Permissions to review recent writes, commands, model tests, tasks, and tools.
